title: Senior Teacher - MT Educare - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - MT Educare - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at MT Educare. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About MT Educare:
MT Educare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MT Educare!
